title: Compare traditional networks with controller-based networking

questions.question: Which statement is correct about controller-based networking?
choices: Controller-based networking is always in the form of hardware appliances.
Controller-based networking has a logically centralized control plane.
Controller-based networking has a logically centralized data plane.
Controller-based networking uses ASICs to centrally switch frames.

correct.explanation: The correct answer is "Controller-based networking has a logically centralized control plane.".

incorrect.explanation: Controller-based networking is always in the form of hardware appliances. does not match the mechanism asked here.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Selecting "Controller-based networking is always in…" without matching the scenario constraint

incorrect.explanation: Controller-based networking has a logically centralized data plane. does not match the mechanism asked here.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Selecting "Controller-based networking has a logica…" without matching the scenario constraint

incorrect.explanation: Controller-based networking uses ASICs to centrally switch frames. does not match the mechanism asked here.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Selecting "Controller-based networking uses ASICs t…" without matching the scenario constraint

answerReview.examTip: Cloud management = central dashboard across sites; on-prem DNA Center keeps control inside your network.

questions.question: Which statement is correct about SDN switches?

All SDN switches are stateful with respect to configuration.
All data flowing through the switch is stateless.
